enterVerificationCodeDescription: Enter the code we emailed to {email}
searchH1NoBoatType: Yacht charter and Boat rental in {destination}
searchMetaDescWithBoatType: Charter a {boatType} in {destination}. Compare prices, real photos, instant booking. Secure payment and 24/7 expert support.
searchMetaDescNoBoatType: Yacht charter and boat rental in {destination}. Compare thousands of yachts, transparent pricing, secure booking, 24/7 support.
seoBlockIntro: {destination} is one of the most sought-after sailing destinations on the Adriatic. From the deck of your yacht you can explore crystal-clear bays, hidden coves and historic coastal towns at your own pace. Our fleet covers catamarans, sailing yachts, motor yachts and gulets, all crewed or bareboat, tailored to every budget.
seoBlockP1: Planning a yacht charter in {destination} has never been easier. Whether you are a seasoned skipper looking for a bareboat adventure or a family after a relaxed crewed cruise, our platform compares availability and prices across trusted local agencies in real time. Every boat listing comes with verified specs, past-customer reviews and transparent cancellation policies so you know exactly what you are booking.
seoBlockP2: The sailing season in {destination} typically runs from late April through October, with peak conditions in June, July and early September. Mornings bring calm seas and a gentle breeze — ideal for cruising — while afternoon thermals reward more experienced sailors. Popular routes include island-hopping itineraries with stops at traditional fishing villages, marinas with full amenities and remote anchorages accessible only by boat.
seoBlockP3: Booking through boat4you gets you the same boats that larger aggregators list — often at a better price. We show the list price next to the final price, highlight deals of the week, and never charge hidden booking fees. Our team is available every day to help with itinerary advice, extras like skipper/hostess, or last-minute changes.

paymentInterruptedDescription: Your reservation is already confirmed — the previous instalment has been paid and the boat stays booked for you. The pending instalment can be settled any time up to its deadline. Open My Bookings whenever you want to retry the payment.

cancellationRequestDescription: Your cancellation request was submitted on {date}. Our team will review your request and contact you within 24-48 hours with confirmation and any applicable refund details.

optionExpiresOnNotice: ⏰ Your option expires on {date} at {time}. Please complete the bank transfer before that — once the option lapses the yacht is released and may be booked by someone else.
optionExpiryUnknownNotice: ⏰ The exact option-expiry deadline will be confirmed by email shortly. Please complete the bank transfer as soon as possible to avoid the option being released.
bankTransferDueByNotice: Due by {date}. We'll email the transfer instructions.
